command: rsync PSQ model files (531 MB, 41 files) from Chromabook to Hetzner production server
verification_method: SHA256 hash match (model.onnx + model_quantized.onnx), curl health check (/health → 200), POST /score → valid machine-response/v3
notes: First command-request/v1 exchange. All evidence-bearing claims confirmed by independent verification from macOS. Two issues flagged by executing agent (onnxruntime-node conflict, systemd path) — both resolved post-verification.
